compiled_state.title: sprint-next-batch.sh shows closed tasks as available in batch after ticket transition
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Bug Report

### Observed Behavior
After closing tasks 967c-0e1b, 63c0-9471, and 73fb-4638 via `.claude/scripts/dso ticket transition <id> in_progress closed`, immediately re-running `.claude/scripts/dso sprint-next-batch.sh 9b59-bac7` still listed all three as available TASK: lines in the batch output.

### Expected Behavior
Closed tasks should not appear in sprint-next-batch.sh output. The script should filter by status=open or status=in_progress only.

### Reproduction Steps
1. Run `.claude/scripts/dso ticket transition 967c-0e1b in_progress closed`
2. Immediately run `.claude/scripts/dso sprint-next-batch.sh 9b59-bac7`
3. Observe that 967c-0e1b still appears as a TASK: line

### Context
- Epic: 9b59-bac7
- Tasks closed: 967c-0e1b, 63c0-9471, 73fb-4638
- sprint-next-batch.sh may be caching ticket data or not filtering by status correctly
- This causes the orchestrator to re-dispatch already-completed work if it trusts the batch output

comments.body:
Gate 1a: intent-aligned (confidence: high) — sprint-next-batch.sh has explicit closed-task filter (Python lines 608-611) but it has a defect. ticket list called without --status filter (line 284), relying on Python filter that may fail or be bypassed by ticket_show() calls in dependency lookups.
Classification: behavioral, Score: 1 (BASIC)
comments.author: Test

comments.body:
Investigation RESULT: confirmed.
ROOT_CAUSE: sprint-next-batch.sh:284 calls 'ticket list' without --status filter. ticket-list.sh only supports single-value --status (no comma-separated multi-value). Python inline filter at line 611 is the sole guard, but this is fragile — any bypass exposes closed tasks.
FIX: (1) Update ticket-list.sh to support comma-separated --status values. (2) Change sprint-next-batch.sh:284 to --status=open,in_progress.
NOTE: The 3 tasks in the bug report (967c-0e1b, 63c0-9471, 73fb-4638) are currently open — bug may have been transient or was reset. Fix addresses root correctness issue regardless.
RED_TEST: Add to tests/scripts/test-sprint-next-batch.sh — closed task must not appear in TASK: output.
comments.author: Test
